Scene.title: The Quad
Scene.description: Greg threatens Tony; Francine rescues Tony on a BMX

Page.StageDirection: SQUISH slowly makes his way to TONY, flanked by some of the boys.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: Go. Go. Get out of here. Quickly.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: Read the room, Stella. Be careful, Tony.

Page.StageDirection: STELLA and PRIYA leave. TONY pulls a Redskin out pocket and nervously eats it. GREG appears.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: Oh, hey Greg. How's it hanging?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: How's it hanging? You know, how are your feelings hanging today? It's a thing I've heard. Pretty cool, hey? I'm kind of the trendsetter around here.
Do you want some of my Redskin? You don't have to have the bit I licked.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: GREG
DialogueBlock.Line: I should thank you. I haven't had a fight like that in this body yet. It's good to get a feel for it.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: GREG
DialogueBlock.Line: You think the children can protect you?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: What do you mean, your body? Guys, what're you doing siding with him?
He's the loosest unit in Grade 10.
I mean he smashed ail the Grade 7s, Tonksie.
He licks toilets, you know Greg.
Maybe he'll drink from one. Let's find out.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: Around the corner from the pet shop! That's all 'm saying.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: GREG
DialogueBlock.Line: Give them now or I'll break your teeth.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: GREG
DialogueBlock.Line: I'm getting them either way, bruh.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: GREG
DialogueBlock.Line: Guess were doing it the fun way

Page.StageDirection: As GREG prepares to hit TONY, the lights go wild. There's smoke. A figure flies out from the shadows, jumping on a BMX bike. She is disguised similarly to GREG, although more put together. She skids to a stop between GREG and TONY and throws down a small string of fireworks that explode, blinding GREG.
He stands on the back pegs as she pedals away.
